summary: Tested Remember Me (30-day login persistence) and Bulk Message sender name fixes. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Remember Me checkbox works correctly, signup flow redirects to dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SignUpRequest model has remember_me field (line 81)
VERIFIED: LoginRequest model has remember_me field (line 86)
VERIFIED: Signup endpoint uses request.remember_me for token creation (line 545) and session expiry (line 549: 30 days if true, 1 day if false)
VERIFIED: Login endpoint uses request.remember_me for token creation (line 597) and session expiry (line 601: 30 days if true, 1 day if false)
VERIFIED: Google OAuth exchange_session reads remember_me from request body (line 711: default true), creates 30-day session (line 712-713)
VERIFIED: Bulk messages now store teacher_name and student_name (lines 1430-1432)
VERIFIED: get_my_messages enriches old messages missing teacher_name/student_name (lines 2240-2254)
VERIFIED: AuthCallback.js sends remember_me: true in session exchange (line 29)
VERIFIED: LoginPage.js sends remember_me in signup request (line 76)
VERIFIED: Database sessions show correct expiry: remember_me=true -> 30 days, remember_me=false -> 1 day

test_credentials.note: Tests create temporary test users with unique emails, no cleanup needed

seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remember Me and Bulk Message fixes verified. Signup/Login with remember_me=true returns expires_in=2592000 (30 days). Signup/Login with remember_me=false returns expires_in=86400 (1 day). Google OAuth defaults to remember_me=true (30 days). Bulk messages now store teacher_name and student_name. Old messages without names are enriched via get_my_messages endpoint.

verified_features.google_oauth_session_exchange: PASSED - endpoint exists and accepts remember_me
verified_features.session_expiry_in_db: PASSED - sessions stored with correct expires_at
verified_features.frontend_remember_me_checkbox: PASSED - visible in login mode, hidden in signup mode, checked by default
verified_features.frontend_signup_flow: PASSED - redirects to dashboard after successful signup
